contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: programs landing page: render description_md as inline markdown
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/116
  
  Details:
  The capoeira.agroverse.shop/practice.html mention on
  truesight.me/programs/tribomirim/ was visible but not clickable.
  
  Root cause: js/program-shell.js was assigning manifest.description_md to
  descEl.textContent, which strips all markdown formatting. Any [label](url)
  link or backtick-wrapped path appeared as literal characters.
  
  Fix: added a minimal inline-markdown shim (handles links + code spans
  only, escape-first to neutralise any pre-existing HTML in the manifest)
  and switched the landing render to innerHTML. Also tidied the tribomirim
  manifest to use proper [`label`](url) syntax around the practice URL so
  the link is explicit, not autolink-dependent. Other program manifests
  (butterfly-effect) have no link/code markup so they continue rendering
  identically.
  
  Shipped via truesight_me_beta PR #116, merged, synced to
  truesight_me_prod. Verified both files in the prod repo via the GitHub
  Contents API (bypassing CDN).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
